scripts.build:pages: npm run build:cf && npm run postbuild:pages
scripts.postbuild:pages: cp public/*.jpg public/*.png .open-next/assets/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/.build .open-next/middleware .open-next/server-functions .open-next/cache .open-next/dynamodb-provider .open-next/cloudflare-templates .open-next/assets/ 2>/dev/null; cp pages-worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js
